overview: Aditya College of Engineering and Technology (ACET) was established in 2004 by the Aditya Academy in Surampalem, East Godavari District (now Kakinada District), Andhra Pradesh. Situated within a vast, eco-friendly campus ecosystem alongside Aditya Engineering College, ACET is recognized for its extensive tech-driven infrastructure and comprehensive career-development programs designed to equip regional students with globally competitive technical and management capabilities.
accreditation: Autonomous status conferred by UGC. Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and permanently affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

nirfRanking.engineering: Ranked with a prominent #AAA+ rating by Careers360 (NIRF evaluation active across university tier structures)
nirfRanking.university: Part of the expansive Aditya group institutional network

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (Computer Science, Data Science, AI & ML, Electronics & Communication, Information Technology, Electrical, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹40,000 – ₹53,500 per year (Category A Convener Quota via AP EAPCET; total fees stretch up to ₹2,14,000 based on specialization paths)

coursesAndFees.program: M.Tech (Computer Science, Embedded Systems, Power Electronics)

placements.highestSalary: ₹19.00 LPA (Historical peak milestone achieved via AWS in 2018-19)
placements.placementRate: 65% – 80% reported across high-demand computer software and circuitry disciplines
placements.totalOffers: Centralized campus drive models regularly yield thousands of collective student offers annually
placements.companiesVisited: 50+ prominent national and global multi-national corporations
placements.internationalOffers: Data not systematically isolated from general corporate pool alignments

admissions.admissionProcess: Category A state counseling seats (70%) are securely administered online by the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) depending on AP EAPCET scores. Remaining Category B seats are completed under standard regulatory institutional management quotas.
admissions.importantDates: The admissions lifecycle routinely operates relative to standard APSCHE release periods spanning June through September.

campus.area: Extensive eco-friendly self-contained educational campus ecosystem
facilities: High-speed Campus Wi-Fi and Advanced IT Infrastructure
Vast Sports Complexes and Active Playgrounds
Extensive Fleet of Dedicated Institutional Transit Buses
Air-Conditioned Seminar Rooms & Smart Lecture Theatres
Dedicated Maker's Zone & IoT Incubation Hub
campus.specialNote: Students at ACET actively share the vast infrastructure, industrial simulation layouts (such as the Polavaram project model display), and a unified centralized corporate placement cell network with other sister organizations on campus.

closingRanks2024.OC Boys: 23,312 – 42,000 (Varies heavily across top choices like Data Science or AI branches)

hostelAndScholarships.hostelFee: ₹45,000 – ₹65,000 per year depending on lodging choices and room specifications
hostelAndScholarships.messFee: Factored inside seasonal structured dining facility profiles
scholarships: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) state tuition-fee waivers for eligible Andhra Pradesh applicants
Post-Matric financial safety schemes from the Department of Welfare
Institutional tuition waivers and award funds for top academic achievers

contact.address: Aditya Nagar, ADB Road, Surampalem, Gandepalli Mandal, Kakinada District - 533437, Andhra Pradesh, India
